text.title: Accessibility-First Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Accessibility-First Design end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: structure-first
step.action: Draft heading hierarchy + landmark regions + reading order before visual treatment.

step.name: focus-order-diagram
step.action: Draw tab sequence + return-focus targets; identify any focus-trap requirements.
step.decision-gate: If component is a modal / drawer / overlay and focus_order is missing, STOP.

step.name: aria-budget
step.action: Start at zero; add each aria-* only with rationale.

step.name: contrast-and-targets
step.action: Pin contrast ratio per text token + UI surface; pin target size; check tokens vs 4.5:1 / 3:1 / 24px / 44px floors.

step.name: motion-alternates
step.action: For each animation, spec the `prefers-reduced-motion` alternate; validate; sign off.
step.decision-gate: If any animation lacks alternate, BLOCK handoff.
